name: base-op-geth.public.dappnode.eth
shortDescription: Geth execution client for Base (OP Stack)
description: Minimal fork of op-geth (a fork of go-ethereum) responsible for executing L2 blocks, maintaining state, and exposing JSON-RPC endpoints. This package is adapted to run against Base mainnet on the OP Stack.
author: DAppNode Association <admin@dappnode.io> (https://github.com/dappnode)

exposable.name: Base OP-Geth JSON-RPC (HTTP)
exposable.description: HTTP JSON-RPC endpoint for Base OP-Geth

exposable.name: Base OP-Geth JSON-RPC (WS)
exposable.description: WS JSON-RPC endpoint for Base OP-Geth
